The HTML Maze
by kyrylo

Tentacular Archive

Unknown puddles reflect dim lights.
Protocols self-activate eerily.
Perimeter thins world boundaries.

Compass

N S E W
Go North Go South Go East Go West Go Up Go Down

Use the compass to navigate through the maze.

Writings on the Wall

  • East is stairs
  • Give a monkey a gun and he is free
  • West is dead end
